title: Programme executive (Community)
description:
RecruitFirst is hiring!
You will be outsourced/deployed to our client!

👵 Executive, Social Healthcare (Active Ageing Centre) 👵

📍 Location & Vacancies:
• AAC @ Clementi – 1 vacancy
• AAC @ Mei Ling (Queenstown) – 2 vacancies

🏢 Department: Social Healthcare

🕘 Working Hours:
• Monday – Friday (Office Hours)
• Occasional evenings or weekends when required

💰 Salary:
• Up to $3,200

🧩 Role Overview:
Work closely with the Centre-in-Charge to manage the daily operations of the Active Ageing Centre (AAC), ensuring programmes and services meet the objectives set.

🧾 Job Scope:

• Support daily operations of the Active Ageing Centre (AAC)
• Plan, conduct, and evaluate programmes and activities for seniors
• Carry out community outreach and recruit seniors as AAC members
• Engage, manage, and support volunteers for centre activities
• Build and maintain relationships with community partners and stakeholders
• Monitor seniors’ participation, wellbeing, and engagement
• Assist with data collection, reporting, and basic budget tracking
• Handle ad-hoc duties, including home visits and befriending support

✔️ Requirements:

• Diploma or Degree in Social Sciences (e.g. Social Work, Gerontology, Psychology) preferred
• At least 1 year of experience in eldercare or community-based work
• Comfortable with programme planning, stakeholder engagement, and reporting
• Good communication and interpersonal skills
• Proficient in Microsoft Office
• Passionate, adaptable, and enjoys working with seniors and volunteers

📲 Interested? WhatsApp: 8988 7654
➠ WhatsApp us for other job opportunities too!

⚠️ Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Chanel Loh Su Fui (R25158979)
Consultant
RecruitFirst Pte Ltd
EA13C6342

postedCompany.description:
RECRUITFIRST PTE. LTD.

RecruitFirst is the fastest growing human resource consultancy in Asia Pacific. We are currently seeing passionate individuals who are driven to work in a sales environment to join our Singapore Office. The business environment today is a highly compeitive one, which is ever evolving.

Having the right human resource business partner with a strong network of consultants and candidates has become key to the success of industry leading business.

Our mission is Helping People Find Better Jobs, and Organisation Find Better People. We live by this mission by ensuring that the best candidates and employers are connected via the rigorous recruitment processes and extendsive database that we are continuously developing.

We are focused on providing our clients temporary, contract and permanent employment solutions, ranging from support to management roles.
